content: We need technical assistance installing air quality monitoring sensors. Can School 2 help with installation guidance?
Happy to help with sensor installation. We can send our technical team to provide on-site guidance and training.
Requesting information about cost-effective air purifier models that work well in large classrooms.
We can share our purchasing experience and supplier contacts. We found some excellent options that balance cost and performance.
Looking for best practices on student education about air quality awareness. Do you have materials we could reference?
We need help setting up data management systems for our air quality sensors. Any guidance would be appreciated.
We can share our mobile app solution and provide training sessions. It's been very effective for our monitoring needs.
We have extra N95 masks available and can share them with your school during high pollution periods.
Seeking collaboration for a joint air quality monitoring workshop. Interested in co-organizing?
Would like to establish a resource-sharing network for air quality equipment during peak pollution seasons.
